executive_summary: This report details findings from our comprehensive security audit conducted across all business units. A total of 47 systems were evaluated, with 3 critical, 8 high, 14 medium, and 22 low severity findings identified.

findings.title: Unpatched Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
findings.description: CVE-2024-1234 allows remote unauthenticated access to administrative endpoints.
findings.remediation: Apply vendor patch immediately and rotate all API keys.

findings.title: Excessive Privilege Escalation Paths
findings.description: Multiple non-privileged accounts have pathways to escalate to domain administrator.
findings.remediation: Implement principle of least privilege and audit group memberships quarterly.

recommendations: Implement zero-trust network architecture within 18 months
Establish a bug bounty program to leverage external security researchers
Increase security awareness training frequency from annual to quarterly
